step0.title: What's your name?
step0.description: Reflex will call you by name — on the dashboard, in morning greetings, and in reminders.

step1.title: Which engine should we use
step1.description: Reflex uses one of three neural networks. Pick the one you prefer — you can change it later in settings.
step1.claudeDescription: Best at understanding context and writing text. Works via the Claude Code CLI.
step1.claudeMissing: Not found — install the Claude Code CLI and sign in
step1.codexDescription: OpenAI Codex CLI with GPT-5. Faster than Claude, requires an OpenAI subscription.
step1.codexMissing: Not found — install the Codex CLI and log in via OpenAI
step1.ollamaDescription: Fully local model. Free, private, slower.
step1.ollamaMissing: Not responding on localhost:11434 — start Ollama

step2.title: What matters to you right now
step2.description: Choose the areas of life Reflex will help with. For each one it will create a separate space with ready-made cards and conversations. You can add more at any time.
step2.folderHint: Spaces are created in the ~/Reflex/ folder — you can move them later.

step3.title: Ready to start?
step3.footer: After clicking "Start", the main screen will open. All settings can be changed later.
